title: Hermes Operations Control Panel

system_status.label: Hermes core
system_status.summary: Represented as sanitized checkpoint status only; no Hermes runtime reads or modifications.

system_status.label: Layered memory
system_status.summary: Checkpoint-level foundation status only; no live memory query.

system_status.label: App Builder
system_status.summary: Static control-panel artifacts generated from sanitized IW package.

system_status.label: Deployment
system_status.summary: GitHub Pages deployment uses docs/ static files only.

cards.title: Hermes Core / Dashboard
cards.summary: Sanitized public status surface only; no live Hermes core, gateway, or dashboard runtime reads were performed.
evidence: No live gateway or dashboard adapter
actions: Define allowed public-safe dashboard fields before any live adapter.

cards.title: Layered Memory
cards.summary: Layered memory is shown only as checkpoint-level foundation status supplied in the sanitized export.
actions: Keep memory status checkpoint-level until a separate safe adapter is approved.

cards.title: App Builder
cards.summary: App Builder artifacts are represented as static public files with deterministic client-side rendering.
actions: Use this static surface as the public handoff for IW checkpoints.

cards.title: Deployment
cards.summary: The control panel is deployed as a GitHub Pages static site with no backend, analytics, external APIs, or CDNs.
evidence: GitHub Pages from docs/ on main
actions: Keep deployment static unless a separate public-safe live-adapter gate is approved.

cards.title: Blocked Items
cards.summary: External integrations and unsafe operations remain blocked unless separately approved.
actions: Keep blocked items visible in every preview and deployment.

cards.title: Rollback Notes
cards.summary: Rollback remains commit-based for GitHub Pages and file-based for local static artifacts.
evidence: Revert the IW-5 commit on main to roll back the live app.
Disable GitHub Pages only if the whole public surface must be taken offline.
actions: Record deployment commit hash after IW-5 push.

blocked_items.reason: External tracker sync is out of scope for this public-safe static app.
External workspace sync is out of scope for this public-safe static app.
External planning integration is out of scope for this public-safe static app.

next_actions: Define the exact public-safe fields allowed in future dashboard status cards.
Add optional client-side grouping or saved filter presets without external integrations.
Prepare a separate approval gate before any live adapter, tracker, or memory integration.
safety_boundary: No external APIs, CDNs, analytics, backend, or server runtime.
No credentials, API keys, private data, Telegram ingestion, or live memory query.
No Hermes runtime modification, provider/model changes, cron, watchdogs, or self-evolution.
GitHub Issues, Notion, and Linear remain blocked pending separate approval.
rollback_notes: Rollback IW-5 by reverting the deployment commit on main and pushing the revert.
If the full public surface must be removed, disable GitHub Pages in repository settings.
Keep local rollback file-based: restore or replace docs/ static files from the prior commit.
acceptance_criteria: Current System Status summary is visible at top.
Status cards can be filtered client-side only.
Next 3 Actions render from sanitized status.json.
Last Updated timestamp renders from sanitized status.json.
Safety Boundary section shows blocked/private gates.
